rows.label: tlk47100041_03_msg0001
rows.name:
The Ion girl at Cole-san's theater
is pretty tough too, huh?

rows.label: tlk47100041_03_msg0002
rows.name:
She was a war orphan
the theater took in
when she was just a baby,

rows.label: tlk47100041_03_msg0003
rows.name:
and now she handles reception
and supplies like an adult.

rows.label: tlk47100041_03_msg0005
rows.name:
By the way, Ion always
gives me a big hug too~

rows.label: tlk47100041_03_msg0006
rows.name:
She loves fluffy animals,
and hugs me so tenderly.

rows.label: tlk47100041_03_msg0007
rows.name: Heh heh heh! Perks of the job!
